title: Cephalophyllum albertiniense
taxonomy: Cephalophyllum albertiniense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. It belongs to the genus Cephalophyllum, which comprises a group of succulent plants. The species C. albertiniense is part of the tribe Ruschieae, which is a subfamily of Aizoaceae. Within the genus Cephalophyllum, C. albertiniense is thought to be closely related to other species such as Cephalophyllum fergusoniae and Cephalophyllum villosulum. Further research and classification might be needed to confirm its exact relationships within the plant kingdom.
